cc:Work.dc:title: Misc - PuzzleBoxPart
cc:Work.dc:description:
One output sheet from the cat puzzle box or its sandpaper lining.
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes PuzzleBoxPart --thickness=10.0 --burn=0.2 --format=svg --reference=0 --labels=false Command line short: boxes PuzzleBoxPart --thickness=10.0 --burn=0.2 --reference=0 --labels=false
